label: May 12, 2026
quote: When your competitor's paperwork clears, your clock starts ticking.
topSignal: CSG/NEC merger clears CFIUS — all regulatory approvals now secured, NEC integration formally unblocked.
channelPulse: Press channels dominated today: CSG drew 13 articles on CFIUS clearance; Amdocs covered by financial media on stock hitting 52-week low ahead of earnings.

csg.relevance: NEC-CSG integration will now accelerate — target CSG customers facing migration uncertainty as a displacement opportunity.
